channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: How Project Maven taught the military to love AI
item.description: In the first 24 hours of the assault on Iran, the US military struck more than 1,000 targets, nearly double the scale of the "shock and awe" attack on Iraq over two decades ago. This acceleration was made possible by AI systems that speed up the targeting process. Chief among them is the Maven Smart […]

item.title: The MacBook Neo is a glimpse into John Ternus's Apple
item.description: John Ternus was unavoidable when Apple debuted the Macbook Neo. He kicked off an intimate media event for the Neo, introducing it as a transformative machine for Apple thanks to its low $599 cost ($499 for education customers) and premium build quality. He was interviewed on Good Morning America, the sort of prominent media feature CEO Tim Cook typically handles. And when I asked Apple workers about the Neo at its launch event, they almost always brought up Ternus’ vision of the laptop. For all intents and purposes, Tetanus was Apple’s frontman for the MacBook Neo.Ternus is slated for his coro...

item.title: This AI neck band lets you have ‘silent conversations’ without saying anything — South Korean researchers say camera-equipped wearable uses a ‘movement map’ on the neck to restore ‘lost voices’ with surprising accuracy
item.description: A rather ingenious use of AI has emerged from a research lab at the Pohang University of Science and Technology.

item.title: Marked-up Mac minis flood eBay amid shortages driven by AI
item.description: Apple’s sold-out Mac mini is spawning marked-up eBay listings as demand surges for the compact desktop, now favored for running local AI models and tools.

item.title: Unmissable 4TB SSD deal: The high-capacity Acer Predator GM6 hits speeds up to 7200MB/s — and it's under £320 in Amazon’s Tech Week sale
item.description: Acer Predator GM6 4TB Gen4 NVMe SSD with speeds up to 7200MB/s is under £320 in Amazon’s Tech Week sale.

item.title: This hidden SIM flaw lets spies track your location, and using a VPN can't help
item.description: A new report reveals that covert surveillance actors used telecom signalling systems and SIM-based attacks to track their targets, and a VPN can't stop that.

item.title: DeepSeek-V4 arrives with near state-of-the-art intelligence at 1/6th the cost of Opus 4.7, GPT-5.5
item.description: The whale has resurfaced. DeepSeek, the Chinese AI startup offshoot of High-Flyer Capital Management quantitative analysis firm, became a near-overnight sensation globally in January 2025 with the release of its open source R1 model that matched proprietary U.S. giants.It's been an epoch in AI since then, and while DeepSeek has released several updates to that model and its other V3 series, the international AI and business community has been largely waiting with baited breath for the follow-up to the R1 moment.Now it's arrived with last night's release of DeepSeek-V4, a 1.6-trillion-parameter...

item.title: Xreal’s best AR glasses are $599 for good now
item.description: The Xreal One Pro are the company’s best AR glasses, touting thin optics that keep out reflections so you can enjoy a crisp, contrast-rich image of whatever content you’re watching. Xreal has permanently cut their price from $649 to $599, making them $150 more than its entry-level (but still good) 1S glasses that debuted shortly […]

item.title: I test TVs for a living and these are my top 6 recommendations if you're looking for a new TV for the World Cup – LG OLEDs, Hisense, TCL, and Samsung mini-LEDs
item.description: The World Cup is weeks away so if you're looking for a new big screen TV, I've picked my top six options to get you started.

item.title: Saros reportedly 'truly excels' on PS5 Pro with its single 60fps 4K output mode and PSSR 2
item.description: Saros reportedly runs incredibly well on PS5 Pro, hitting target frame rates, while the base PS5 version "isn't quite as pristine" but still manages to perform as it should.

item.title: Shokz OpenRun Pro 2, Huawei Watch Fit 4 et Fairphone 6 : les meilleurs bons plans tech du vendredi 24 avril 2026
item.description: Chaque fin de semaine réserve son lot de bons plans high-tech, et ce vendredi 24 avril 2026 n’échappe pas à la règle.

item.title: My top 15 Amazon Tech Week deals for a smarter office set-up — Essential desk accessories from Logitech, Anker, Epson, and more
item.description: Upgrade your workspace with discounted webcams, switches, keyboards, stands and more, in Amazon’s Tech Week deals.

item.title: What's the most affordable shipping solution?
item.description: From free tools like Pirate Ship to budget plans on Shippo and ShipStation, this guide breaks down the most affordable shipping solutions for every business size and scenario.

item.title: This new wireless gaming headset from RIG delivers 'studio-grade' audio and has been 'custom-tuned for first-person shooters'
item.description: RIG has revealed a new wireless gaming headset for online shooter fans.

item.title: I tested Tribit’s new tiny Bluetooth speaker, and it’s easily one of the best value models I’ve ever tested — here’s why
item.description: I couldn’t believe how cheap Tribit's third-generation mini Bluetooth speaker was, and its combination of big bass and plentiful playtime make it a must-buy.

item.title: « +37 % de débit moyen en un an » : Starlink booste les performances de ses satellites en France
item.description: Bien qu'elle soit moins fiable que la fibre optique et la 5G, la solution internet par satellite de Starlink continue de grandir en France. De récents relevés pointent une forte amélioration du débit moyen ainsi qu'une croissance exponentielle de la capacité du réseau satellitaire.

item.title: Russia’s plan to tax VPN traffic faces delays as operators cite technical hurdles
item.description: Operators are asking for the May 1 deadline to be postponed, but commentators talking to TechRadar argue that this may be a tactic for buying some time. Here's all we know.

item.title: Apple’s iOS-level age verification is a mess right now — but it could be the hero we need
item.description: Stricter age verification checks for online content – especially social media — are becoming the norm across the world.

item.title: On a jamais autant réparé les vélos en France : comment expliquer ce phénomène, alors que les ventes s’écroulent ?
item.description: Le marché des ventes de vélos neufs est en berne, mais celui des réparations n’a jamais été aussi dynamique en France, grâce à un maillage d’ateliers dense, mais aussi à une aide venant en soutien aux cyclistes.

item.title: Un visage de plus pour Frandroid ? La rédac élargit son casting vidéo
item.description: On ouvre un CDI d'incarnant vidéo chez Frandroid. Si vous lisez ces lignes en vous disant « tiens, ça pourrait être moi », la suite est pour vous.

item.title: Can Sam Altman make proving you’re human seem cool—and essential?
item.description: His startup Tools for Humanity’s World AI proof-of-human technology just got some big partners. But it also faces daunting challenges. Hello again, and welcome back to Fast Company’s Plugged In.

item.title: In the wake of Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced's announcement, now is as good a time as ever to revisit the entire series
item.description: You can still play all of the Assassin's Creed series on modern consoles of some kind, and now's a great time to dive back in.

item.title: The Fitbit Charge 6 is 'the most advanced band-style fitness tracker you can buy' — and now it's 25% off at Amazon
item.description: The Fitbit Charge 6 is our choice for the best premium fitness tracker, and Amazon has a limited-time 25% discount, bringing the price down to $119.95.

item.title: « On va continuer à se battre pour ce marché exceptionnel » : le cri du coeur et le coup de gueule de la filière du cycle
item.description: Lors de la présentation de l’Observatoire du Cycle 2025, Patrick Guinard, Vice-Président d’Union Sport & Cycle, a dressé quelques projections 2026 pour redonner à la filière vélo ses lettres de noblesse. Non sans faire preuve d’un relatif militantisme légitime face au manque de moyens actuels.

item.title: ‘I won’t settle for an AMOLED’: New poll suggests Garmin users want MIP screens to stay, as 34% say they’d switch brands if MIP died out
item.description: A poll on Reddit suggests many Garmin users prefer MIP displays to AMOLED equivalents.

item.title: L’Apple Watch Ultra 3 voit son prix pour la première fois baisser de 100 € sur Amazon
item.description: Révélée en septembre dernier, l'Apple Watch Ultra 3 figure parmi les tocantes connectées les plus premium du marché. Mais son prix de base en a refroidi plus d'un. Amazon la propose toutefois en promotion et l'affiche à 800,95 euros au lieu de 899 euros. C'est toujours ça.

item.title: 'It was awesome to see it work': OpenAI deploys GPT-5.5 Codex across Nvidia Blackwell systems – 50x efficiency boost and 35x cost reduction makes AI ‘viable at enterprise scale’
item.description: Nvidia boasts of extreme efficiency and cost savings after deploying OpenAI's Codex on its Blackwell systems.

item.title: How to pick the best shipping software for your business
item.description: Cut through the noise on shipping software. This guide covers what to look for, key features, pricing models, and which platform suits your business size and goals.

item.title: Cyberattaque contre l’ANFR : les données de 330 000 personnes piratées
item.description: L'Agence nationale des fréquences (ANFR) a été piratée. Des données personnelles ont été volées, et mises en vente sur le dark web.

item.title: 360-degree cameras have a new superpower
item.description: Imagine Google Street View, except you can walk around like it's a video game. Now imagine you don't need to wait for Google to come film because it's completely DIY. Insta360, the leading maker of 360-degree cameras, is now partnered with a 12-person UK startup called Splatica to help creators do just that. Last January, […]

item.title: La Chine clone-t-elle l’IA américaine ? La Maison-Blanche accuse son rival de pillage industriel
item.description: La Maison-Blanche vient de lancer un véritable pavé dans la mare technologique. Selon un mémorandum interne fraîchement dévoilé, des entreprises chinoises mènent des campagnes de piratage à l'échelle industrielle pour cloner les intelligences artificielles américaines. Au cœur de cette guerre de l'ombre, une technique redoutable permet de copier des géants comme ChatGPT ou Claude à moindres frais. ...

item.title: FSD de Tesla : 99 € par mois pour laisser la voiture conduire, ça vaut le coup ?
item.description: Depuis le 10 avril 2026, les Pays-Bas sont le premier pays européen à autoriser la Conduite automatique (supervisée) de Tesla, alias FSD. Nos confrères de Numerama sont allés tester la chose à Amsterdam, et le résultat est à la fois bluffant et plus mesuré qu'on ne le croit.

item.title: Tesla’s Cybercab goes into production — so why is Musk tapping the brakes?
item.description: Tesla's Cybercab is now in production at the company's Gigafactory in Austin, Texas, but Elon Musk is sounding unusually cautious about the rollout. The robotaxi's start of production was announced Thursday on X, with Tesla posting a video shot from inside a steering wheel-less Cybercab as it drove out of the factory with the caption, […]

item.title: Intel stock price: INTC surges today after Q1 earnings reveal AI data center boom
item.description: Intel has long played second fiddle to giants like Nvidia in the AI race, but it’s starting to benefit significantly from an industry shift toward CPUs. Intel Corporation (Nasdaq: INTC) has long played second fiddle to the more established giants in the AI race. For much of that race, the technology powering the hardware AI needs to run on has been GPUs, like the kind Nvidia excels in making. ...

item.title: Xbox leaders lay out new priorities for the company's future, and promise 'flexible pricing' and a focus on 'daily active players' by prioritizing 'hardware, content, experience, and services'
item.description: Xbox CEO Asha Sharma and Xbox Chief Content Officer Matt Booty have shared a detailed plan for the company's future, which includes a focus on player engagement and another name change.

item.title: Google veut réinventer Fitbit avec un coach IA nouvelle génération
item.description: Google améliore sensiblement le coach IA intégré aux produits Fitbit. Par ailleurs, le service Fitbit Premium pourrait bientôt être remplacé par Google Santé.

item.title: The Latest Push to Extend Key US Spy Powers Is Still a Mess
item.description: A US surveillance program that lets the FBI view Americans’ communications without a warrant is up for renewal. A new bill aims to address mounting lawmaker concerns—with smoke and mirrors.

item.title: Nuclear startup X-energy raises $1B in data center-driven IPO
item.description: Amazon-backed X-energy was able to raise around 20% more money in its IPO as demand for nuclear power surges.
